problem_solved: Early detection of skin cancer through AI-powered analysis of skin lesions and moles using smartphone photos
who_buys_it: Individuals concerned about skin health, health insurance companies, and healthcare providers in Nordic countries (Sweden, Norway, Denmark, Finland)
key_features: AI-powered skin cancer detection with 90%+ sensitivity
Photo analysis of moles and skin spots
Integration with dermatologists for professional review
business_model: B2C subscription (individual users) and B2B partnerships with health insurers and healthcare systems
why_varden_should_care: While headquartered in Netherlands, SkinVision has significant Nordic market presence and represents a successful model for dermatology-focused digital health. Demonstrates validated AI approach to skin condition screening, which could inform investment theses in similar dermatology tech platforms.

problem_solved: Provides accessible digital and physical healthcare services, reducing wait times and improving access to medical professionals including dermatologists
who_buys_it: Individuals seeking quick access to healthcare, regional healthcare systems, and employers offering health benefits
key_features: Digital consultations via video/chat with doctors, psychologists, nurses, and physiotherapists
Fast access (within 2 minutes for digital consultations)
business_model: B2C (direct patient consultations) and B2G (partnerships with regional healthcare authorities in Sweden, Norway, and other European countries)
why_varden_should_care: Leading Nordic digital health platform with proven model for hybrid digital/physical care delivery. While not dermatology-specific, Kry demonstrates the scalability of digital health in Nordic markets and could expand dermatology services. Strong track record with 14M+ encounters validates the digital health model in Nordics.

problem_solved: Comprehensive spa and wellness center management, including booking, guest management, and integration with hotel operations
who_buys_it: Spa facilities, wellness centers, aesthetic clinics, and hotels offering spa services across Scandinavia
key_features: Integrated booking system for spa treatments and appointments
Integration with hotel PMS (Property Management System)
business_model: SaaS subscription model targeting spa and wellness facilities
why_varden_should_care: While primarily focused on spa/hotel wellness operations, Visbook serves aesthetic clinics in the Nordics and demonstrates the market for practice management software in the wellness/beauty space. Could represent an opportunity to understand the Nordic wellness market or explore expansion into medical aesthetics.

problem_solved: Online marketplace and practice management software for beauty salons, spas, and aesthetic clinics
who_buys_it: Beauty salons, spas, aesthetic clinics, and wellness centers across Europe including Nordic countries
business_model: SaaS subscription for practice management software plus commission on marketplace bookings
why_varden_should_care: Leading European beauty/wellness marketplace with practice management capabilities. While not Nordic-specific, has presence in multiple European markets. Demonstrates the B2B2C model for aesthetic/wellness services and could provide market intelligence on clinic management needs.

problem_solved: Digital practice management and patient acquisition platform for healthcare providers including dermatologists and aesthetic clinics
who_buys_it: Healthcare providers, dermatologists, aesthetic clinics, and medical practices across Europe including Nordic countries
business_model: SaaS subscription for practice management plus listing fees on marketplace platform
why_varden_should_care: Leading European healthcare practice management platform with presence across multiple markets. While not Nordic-specific, demonstrates the business model for clinic management software and could have insights into dermatology practice needs. Potential acquisition target or market entrant for Nordic dermatology space.

hq_location: San Luis Obispo, California, USA (with global operations including Nordics)
problem_solved: Comprehensive business management software for wellness, beauty, and aesthetic businesses
who_buys_it: Wellness studios, aesthetic clinics, beauty salons, and fitness centers globally including Nordic countries
key_features: Point of sale and payment processing
business_model: SaaS subscription model with tiered pricing based on features and business size
why_varden_should_care: Global leader in wellness/beauty business management software. While US-based, has international presence and demonstrates the feature set needed for aesthetic clinic management. Could provide market intelligence on the needs of aesthetic clinics or represent a potential acquirer of Nordic clinic software companies.
